name: pi-conventions
description: Pi package for enforcing codebase conventions through structure and naming policies.
author: Brandon

scripts.conventions:audit: npx tsx -e "(async () => { const { loadState } = await import('./src/core/config.ts'); const { auditConventions } = await import('./src/core/diagnostics.ts'); const s = await loadState(process.cwd()); console.log(await auditConventions(process.cwd(), s.config!)); })();"
